chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 748 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of post-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of post-arrest bail 25.09.2025 Mr. Sartaj Haider, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Alam Sher Khan Bozdar, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Although adjournment is being sought on part of learned Counsel for the applicant as is reported to be busy before another Bench of this Court, observing that the crime, being No.130 of 2025 registered at Police Station Daharki, District Ghotki, alleged against the applicant is under Section 4/8 of the Sindh Prohibition of Preparation, Manufacturing, Storage, Sale and use of Gutka and Manpuri Act, 2019, wherein recovery of 920 and 480 gutka puris of different names have been made, learned DPG was called upon for his view in this regard, who concedes to the bail on account of co-accused already entertained bail. Accordingly, this bail application is allowed, and the applicant is admitted to post-arrest bail subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees fifty thousand) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court. J U D G E Abdul Basit
